contradicting_evidence: Need:* Target *social reproduction crises* (e.g., childcare deserts, car-dependent infrastructure) as *material determinants* of consciousness—not “lifestyle” choices. Mill’s political economy must be extended to *unpaid reproductive labor*.

Need:* Reject “backwardness” narratives. Focus on *material continuity* (e.g., land tenure, craft traditions) as sites of *counter-hegemonic potential* (per Marx’s inversion of Feuerbach). Positivist “scientific” models fail to account for *non-commodified social logic*.
